findings.evidence: PaymentStrategyFactory includes three strategy branches that are not used by any caller.
findings.minimal_fix: Keep the currently used strategy path and remove dormant strategy registrations.
findings.verification: Run payment unit tests and verify only active strategy dependency remains in imports.

findings.evidence: Refactor and behavior change are mixed in one commit around retry policy.
findings.minimal_fix: Split into two commits: rename-only refactor first, policy behavior update second.
findings.verification: Compare test results and diff statistics separately for the two commits.
